Careers
CORPORATE CATERING AND PRIVATE EVENTS

PICKY EATERS, ADVENTUROUS EATERS, WHATEVER YOUR TASTES, WE HAVE SOMETHING FOR YOU!

Are you looking for expertise, freshness and quality without moving? It’s finally possible with our catering solutions!

Our clients confirm that employee productivity increases with our daily meal service. They are happier and look forward to a more positive day. With a high intake of nutrients and vitamins, our sandwiches and meals help you perform better and stay healthier.
With a very competitive price per person, our catering solution is more cost-effective than take-out, more convenient than packing lunches every night and as tasty as a home-cooked meal. We also provide drinks and snacks/desserts.

PRIVATE EVENT

Need someone to take care of all the details of your upcoming event and don’t know where to start? Ask for our help and we will be happy to assist you with your event planning and vegan options.

LUFAS FARMS

For some time now, Baguette Brochette has joined the local Montreal platform of Lufas Farms. We are delighted to be part of this great fresh, local and responsible Market.














© 2018 Baguette Brochette. Tous droits réservés.

Website by SOLVTK Agency
